name: Kenneth Jennings
tagline: Building systems at the intersection of business, cloud, and AI.
about: I’m an Information Systems student at Ball State University and a Miller Leadership Academy Scholar. I focus on combining technical systems with business strategy, with growing experience in web development and AI-driven workflows through my internship work.

impact: Analyzed and improved UI to enhance user experience
Collaborated with leadership and Fortune 100 professionals to strengthen platform credibility
Streamlined internal workflows to improve efficiency

projects.name: Personal Resume Website
